candidates.why: Semantically the best match for current portion of long-term debt; acceptable even though preview values are blank.

variables.notes: Best available balance-sheet match for short-term debt/current maturities. Manual review because the preview shows blanks and there is no clean current borrowings line visible; chosen over lease-related rows per exclusion rule.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
